Visualize a COIL object image

Source: R/coil.R
show_coil_object.Rd

Display a COIL-20 or COIL-100 object pose.

Usage

show_coil_object(df, object, pose)

Arguments

df

Data frame returned by download_coil20() or download_coil100(). Canonical list results returned with as = "list" are also supported.

object

Object id to display. COIL-20 contains objects 1 to 20 and COIL-100 contains objects 1 to 100.

pose

For COIL-20, the pose id to display, from 0 to 71. For COIL-100, the viewing angle, from 0 to 355 in five-degree increments.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
coil20 <- download_coil20()
show_coil_object(coil20, object = 5, pose = 4)
} # }
